queries.question: Show me the majors and campuses of students with the last name Smith.
queries.sql: SELECT Major, Campus from Students where FullName LIKE '% Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?major ?campus WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:Major ?major .
  ?students p:Campus ?campus .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?fullname_lk), "^.*\\ Smith$"))
}

queries.question: What are the majors, cities and campuses of students with the last name of Smith?
queries.sql: SELECT Major, City, Campus from Students where FullName LIKE '% Smith'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?major ?city ?campus WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:Major ?major .
  ?students p:City ?city .
  ?students p:Campus ?campus .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?fullname_lk), "^.*\\ Smith$"))
}

queries.question: List the students who have a major in mathematics and the city where they are located
queries.sql: SELECT FullName, City from Students WHERE Major = 'Mathematics'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?city WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:City ?city .
  ?students p:Major ?major_f .
  FILTER(STR(?major_f) = "Mathematics")
}

queries.question: List the students who have a major in mathematics and the city and campus where they are located
queries.sql: SELECT FullName, City, Campus from Students WHERE Major = 'Mathematics'

SELECT ?fullname ?city ?campus WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?students p:City ?city .
  ?students p:Campus ?campus .
  ?students p:Major ?major_f .
  FILTER(STR(?major_f) = "Mathematics")
}

Show me the name and location of the students with a major in mathematics
